message:
fix(mvcc,pager,btree,func,vdbe,types): stabilize IPC on nix crate and fix correctness issues

Replace nightly-only `peer_credentials_unix_socket` and
`unix_socket_ancillary_data` features with the stable `nix` crate for
Unix domain socket peer authentication and SCM_RIGHTS fd passing. This
removes two `#![feature(...)]` gates and unblocks building on stable
Rust toolchains.

MVCC correctness:
- Remove unused `clear_payload_fields` from SharedTxnSlot (callers
  already removed; dead code caused confusion)
- SSI edge discovery now uses `witness_keys_overlap()` for fine-grained
  conflict filtering instead of tag-only Cell matching, reducing false
  positive serialization failures

Pager/cache correctness:
- Ghost pruning horizon check changed from `<` to `<=` so entries
  exactly at the horizon are pruned (off-by-one caused ghost list bloat)
- `decrement_page_version` uses `saturating_sub` to prevent underflow
  panic on double-decrement edge case
- WAL commit frames now written in deterministic page-number order so
  crash recovery replays are reproducible
- Truncation now followed by fsync for durability of new file size

B-tree hardening:
- `insert_cell_into_page` uses `checked_sub` for content offset to
  return a clean error instead of wrapping on oversized cells
- Overflow chain read/write validates `usable_size > 4` upfront to
  prevent division-by-zero on corrupt headers

Collation fix:
- NOCASE collation now uppercases (matching SQLite's `A-Z` canonical
  form) instead of lowercasing; fixes index key comparison mismatches
  and updates VDBE Compare opcode to use collation from P4

Value coercion:
- `try_coerce_text_to_numeric` now allows `1e999`-style overflow
  literals that parse to Inf (SQLite treats these as REAL), while still
  rejecting bare "inf"/"nan" text

FEC page offset:
- `read_page_from_bytes` uses u64 intermediate to prevent usize
  overflow on 32-bit targets with large page numbers

nix dependency expanded: added socket, uio, user features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -152,7 +152,7 @@ blake3 = "1.5"
 crossbeam-epoch = "0.9"
 crossbeam-deque = "0.8"
 sha2 = "0.10"
-nix = { version = "0.29", default-features = false, features = ["fs"] }
+nix = { version = "0.29", default-features = false, features = ["fs", "socket", "uio", "user"] }
 libc = "0.2"
 chacha20poly1305 = "0.10"
 argon2 = "0.5"

@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
-#![cfg_attr(target_family = "unix", feature(peer_credentials_unix_socket))]
-#![cfg_attr(target_os = "linux", feature(unix_socket_ancillary_data))]
+// Peer credentials and ancillary fd passing now use the `nix` crate (stable Rust)
+// instead of nightly #![feature(peer_credentials_unix_socket)] and
+// #![feature(unix_socket_ancillary_data)].
 
 //! MVCC page-level versioning for concurrent writers.
 //!
